claimText: Tsinghua University's Guiding Principles establish five core principles for AI in education: principal responsibility (AI as auxiliary tool, teachers and students as primary agents), compliance and integrity, data security, prudence and critical thinking, and fairness and inclusiveness.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 「总则」部分明确了学校「积极而审慎」的基本立场，并提出「主体责任」「合规诚信」「数据安全」「审慎思辨」「公平包容」五大核心原则。

citation.citationTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
